keywords.label: Hit
keywords.hint: Melee strike. Blocked, absorbed by armor, dodged by evasion, parried.

keywords.label: Grab
keywords.hint: Bypasses block and armor. Loses to hit, dodged by evasion.

keywords.label: Projectile
keywords.hint: Intrinsically homing (beats evasion). Blocked, armored, or reflected. Persists in flight until it lands, clashes, or is reflected.

keywords.label: Parry
keywords.hint: Active counter. Triggers when an enemy hit enters its window: incoming hit nullified, attacker stunned per parry's own payload. Loses to grab and projectile.

keywords.label: Effect
keywords.hint: State-changing attack window. Instant (HP/rage/etc.) or standing (duration-bounded modifier). Activation is low-priority; active standing effects are high-priority.

keywords.label: Block
keywords.hint: Per-frame defense tokens. Each token absorbs one hit. blockStun extensions draw from the block pool.

keywords.label: Armor
keywords.hint: Absorbs hit/projectile stun for up to `absorbs` hits; damage still applies. Armor breaks after `absorbs` is exceeded.

keywords.label: Evasion
keywords.hint: Dodges hit and grab. Loses to projectile (always homing).

keywords.label: Reflect
keywords.hint: Reverses a projectile back at the caster (owner flipped). `reflectTravel` frames until return.

keywords.label: Cancel
keywords.hint: Single-frame point where a card can truncate and hand off to the next slot. Fires via `hitCancel` (after a prior connect) or via arming (rage pre-paid at commit).

keywords.label: Hit Stun
keywords.hint: Frames of stun placed on the defender when a hit lands through defense. Defaults to the hit window's frame count if omitted.

keywords.label: Block Stun
keywords.hint: Frames of block extension placed on the defender when a hit lands on a block token. Extensions draw from the block pool; overflow becomes stun tokens.

keywords.label: Defense Breaker
keywords.hint: Attack ignores block and armor; still stoppable by parry (nullified) and evasion (dodged).

keywords.label: Knockdown
keywords.hint: A knockdown-flagged hit places knockdown tokens (defender is untouchable during them) and ends the showdown on connect.

keywords.label: Rage Cost
keywords.hint: Rage pre-paid at commit. Used to arm a cancel, play a variant (EX), or play a Super (required variant).

keywords.label: Rage
keywords.hint: Offensive resource gained 1:1 from damage taken. Spent on armed cancels, EX variants, and Supers. Non-refundable once spent.

keywords.label: Block Pool
keywords.hint: Six tokens per showdown (refills between showdowns). Spent on block-spacer slots at commit and on block-stun extensions reactively during showdown.

keywords.label: Block Spacer
keywords.hint: A card-less sequence slot that places `tokens` consecutive block tokens from the pool. Useful for frame alignment and defensive cushions.

keywords.label: Variant (EX)
keywords.hint: A card's rage-paid alternate version. Inherits base windows sub-key-wise for attack/defense; replaces cancelWindow wholesale.

keywords.label: Super
keywords.hint: A card whose `rageVariant.required === true` — base is unplayable, can only be played as variant.

keywords.label: Hits
keywords.hint: Multi-hit count on an attack window. Multi-hit interacts with block tokens, armor absorbs, and projectile clash via the hit-subtraction rule.

keywords.label: Travel Frames
keywords.hint: Projectile's global-frame delay from spawn to arrival. Fast (3-6), medium (8-14), heavy (18-30).

keywords.label: Reflect Travel
keywords.hint: Frames until a reflected projectile returns. 0 = instant counter, 1-4 = short, 5+ = slow/mitigation-only.

keywords.label: Sequence
keywords.hint: A seat-owned queue of face-down slots. Committed in the commit phase; dequeued onto the timeline during showdown.

keywords.label: Timeline
keywords.hint: The shared resolution clock. Cursor advances frame-by-frame; tokens live at frames; interactions resolve here.

keywords.label: Inventory
keywords.hint: Hero's private set of equipped items. Items commit to sequence slots; resolve on dequeue; return to inventory until usages hit 0.

keywords.label: Standing Effect
keywords.hint: Effect with a duration; modifies future frame resolution until its effect-end token fires.
